personas.name: Rust Developer
personas.role: External consumer who wants to embed Aion or build on its primitives

stories.text: I can add aion-core to my Cargo.toml and use the event model and identifiers without pulling in the engine or beamr.
I can discover Aion crates on crates.io by searching for 'workflow engine' or 'durable execution'.
I can read docs.rs documentation for any Aion crate and find usage examples.
I can run cargo publish --dry-run on any crate to verify it's publishable.

personas.name: Aion Maintainer
personas.role: Team member who publishes new versions to crates.io

stories.text: I can run a single script that publishes all crates in the correct dependency order.
I can verify that no crate has path-only dependencies that would prevent crates.io publication.
